tools.title: The Secret Life of Your Socks
tools.description: A playful but rigorous model about orphan socks, mismatch penalties, and sustainable everyday decision-making.
tools.body: Best for visitors who want to see how ACML turns a surprising question into a model, a narrative, and an interactive experience.

tools.title: Exploration RL Lab: From Bandits to Gridworld
tools.description: An interactive reinforcement learning demo that teaches exploration vs. exploitation by connecting multi-armed bandits with gridworld learning.
tools.body: Designed for teaching and self-study, the lab pairs a configurable bandit simulator with a compact gridworld so visitors can see how simple exploration heuristics evolve into policy learning.

tools.title: Scholar Disruptiveness Analyzer
tools.description: Analyze an OpenAlex researcher profile and inspect paper-level disruptiveness statistics, distributions, and relationships.
tools.body: Useful for researchers exploring publication portfolios through a scientometrics lens, with direct visual summaries and exportable tables.

tools.title: Authorship Deal Risk Checker
tools.description: Estimate how fragile a proposed academic authorship arrangement is before submission using transparent browser-only heuristics.
tools.body: Useful for research teams who want a calm, structured way to surface likely veto points, under-credit signals, and late-stage renegotiation risk.
